title: AKM Configuration
description: Configuration file for the akm CLI (Agent Kit Manager). Stored at ~/.config/akm/config.json (Linux/macOS) or %APPDATA%\akm\config.json (Windows). Supports JSONC (JavaScript-style comments).

stashDir.description: Path to the working stash directory.

semanticSearchMode.description: Semantic vector search mode. "auto" enables embedding generation and hybrid FTS5 + vector search. "off" disables embeddings and uses text-only search.

registries.description: Configured registries for kit discovery. When absent, built-in defaults are used (official registry + skills.sh). An explicit empty array disables all registries.

stashes.description: Additional stash sources (filesystem paths and remote providers).

sources.description: Canonical key for additional sources (filesystem paths and remote providers).

defaultWriteTarget.description: Default destination for `akm remember` / `akm import` and any other write helper that does not receive an explicit `--target`.

installed.description: Installed kit metadata. Managed automatically by akm install/uninstall commands — do not edit manually.

index.description: Per-pass `akm index` configuration. Keys are pass names; values configure each pass.

security.description: Security controls for install-time auditing and registry allowlists.

stashInheritance.description: Controls how a config layer's stashes interact with stashes inherited from earlier layers.

writable.description: When true, the primary stash is treated as a writable git repo and `akm save` will push after committing.

agent.description: Optional agent CLI integration block. Configures external agent CLIs that akm can shell out to.

minScore.description: Minimum score floor for semantic-only hits. Hits below this score are dropped.

graphBoost.description: Graph boost tuning for search-time ranking.

directBoostPerEntity.description: Additive direct-match boost per matched entity.

directBoostCap.description: Maximum direct-match additive boost per hit.

hopBoostPerEntity.description: Additive connected-entity boost per matched graph entity.

hopBoostCap.description: Maximum connected-entity additive boost per hit.

maxHops.description: Maximum graph traversal depth from query-matched entities.

confidenceMode.description: Confidence integration mode for graph boost scoring.

confidenceWeight.description: Blend strength in [0,1] when confidenceMode is "blend".

BaseConnectionConfig.description: Shared fields for OpenAI-compatible connection configurations.

apiKey.description: API key for authenticated endpoints. Prefer environment variables — API keys are stripped from the config file on save.

EmbeddingConnectionConfig.description: OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint configuration. When not set, uses local @huggingface/transformers with Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5.

dimension.description: Output vector dimension. Must match the index dimension (typically 384).

LlmConnectionConfig.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint configuration for metadata generation. When not set, the indexer uses heuristic metadata generation instead.

concurrency.description: Max parallel LLM requests issued by index passes.

contextLength.description: Model context window size in tokens used for prompt chunk sizing.

judgeModel.description: Optional model override for the LLM-as-judge lesson quality gate.

capabilities.description: Capability flags learned at setup time.

structuredOutput.description: Whether the model reliably emits strict JSON.

curate_rerank.description: Gates the `akm curate` LLM rerank pass.

feedback_distillation.description: Gates improve-driven feedback distillation into proposals.

memory_consolidation.description: Gates automatic memory consolidation during `akm improve`.

lesson_quality_gate.description: Gates the LLM-as-judge quality check in lesson distillation.

extraParams.description: Arbitrary provider-specific parameters forwarded to chat completions.

format.description: Default output format for CLI commands.

detail.description: Default output detail level for CLI commands.

RegistryConfigEntry.description: Configuration for a kit registry used for discovery and installation.

provider.description: Provider type that handles this registry. Built-in providers: "static-index", "skills-sh".

options.description: Arbitrary provider-specific options passed through to the provider.

StashConfigEntry.description: Configuration for an additional source (filesystem or remote).

path.description: Filesystem path. Used when type is "filesystem".

url.description: Remote URL. Used for remote providers ("git", "website").

writable.description: Whether akm may write assets to this source.

primary.description: Marks this entry as the primary working stash (replaces the top-level `stashDir`).

options.description: Arbitrary provider-specific options. For `git` sources, `pushOnCommit: true` causes write-source to `git push` after each successful commit.

wikiName.description: When set, .md files in this source are indexed as wiki pages under this name.

InstalledKitEntry.description: Metadata for an installed kit. Managed by akm — do not edit manually.

ref.description: Full reference string used to resolve the kit.

stashRoot.description: Filesystem path where the kit assets are installed.

cacheDir.description: Filesystem path to the kit's cache directory.

installedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the kit was installed.
